calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

Mark Carton, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FOREVER BENEFICIAL, LLC, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant SF MEDICAL IMAGING, INC.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff FOREVER BENEFICIAL, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant SF MEDICAL IMAGING, INC. as follows:
DAMAGES $51,170.00; COSTS $742.; ATTY FEES $1750.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-20-2011 Continued To Feb-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN Clerk: Jacque Willis-McGhee Reporter: B. FIELDS, #7235

C/C FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP; PLTF COUNSEL M. DAVID DESANTIS PRESENT; MATTER CONT TO 2/24/11 9AM DEPT 514 FOR PROVE UP
